name: CloudFront Distribution
description: Amazon CloudFront CDN distribution for fast, secure content delivery

inputs.name: comment
inputs.label: Distribution Name / Comment
inputs.description: Human-readable name or comment for the distribution

inputs.name: enabled
inputs.label: Enabled
inputs.description: Enable the distribution immediately after creation

inputs.name: is_ipv6_enabled
inputs.label: IPv6 Enabled
inputs.description: Enable IPv6 support for the distribution

inputs.name: default_root_object
inputs.label: Default Root Object
inputs.description: File to serve when the root URL is requested (e.g. index.html)

inputs.name: price_class
inputs.label: Price Class
inputs.description: PriceClass_100 = US/Europe only (cheapest), PriceClass_All = all edge locations

inputs.name: http_version
inputs.label: HTTP Version
inputs.description: Maximum HTTP version to support for viewers. http2and3 is recommended for best performance.

inputs.name: aliases
inputs.label: Alternate Domain Names (CNAMEs)
inputs.description: Comma-separated custom domain names. Requires an ACM certificate in us-east-1.

inputs.name: origins
inputs.label: Origins (JSON)
inputs.description: Map of origins (S3, ALB, custom HTTP servers). Each key is the origin ID.

inputs.name: default_cache_behavior
inputs.label: Default Cache Behavior (JSON)
inputs.description: Default behavior for requests not matching other cache behaviors

inputs.name: ordered_cache_behavior
inputs.label: Ordered Cache Behaviors (JSON)
inputs.description: List of additional cache behaviors for specific URL patterns (evaluated in order)

inputs.name: restrictions
inputs.label: Geo Restrictions (JSON)
inputs.description: Geographic restriction settings for the distribution

inputs.name: viewer_certificate
inputs.label: Viewer Certificate (JSON)
inputs.description: SSL/TLS certificate config. Must be an ACM cert in us-east-1 for custom domains.

inputs.name: logging_config
inputs.label: Access Logging (JSON)
inputs.description: S3 bucket configuration for CloudFront access logs
